beauséjour residence

beauséjour residence

The Beauséjour Residence is a 3,000-square-foot, three-story home near the Montreal Prairie River, currently in pre-construction. The project emphasizes sustainability, efficiency, and comfort, with plans to use a prefabricated wood structure to minimize waste and enhance precision.

Designed to meet Net Zero Ready standards, the home integrates passive solar heating, high-performance windows and doors, and a connection to its natural surroundings. This project demonstrates a commitment to sustainable, high-performance living.

project in numbers

- Project Type: Residential, New Construction
- Square Footage: 3,000 sq. ft.
- Pre-construction
- Target Certification: Net Zero Ready
- Structure: Wood Prefabricated
- Energy Features: Passive Solar Heating, High-Performance Windows and Doors
